title: The Ultimate PvP pack
description: The only PvP modpack you'll ever need...
body:
This is a minecraft modpack that designed for PVPers from a PVPer

## IMPORTANT!!!:
  If you only want good FPS download the "(anti/non Lunar / Performance)" versions

  The Lunar versions also work for the most other launchers like modrinth(its not lunar only)

this mod includes performances mods like "[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)", "[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)", "[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)" and many PVP mods like "[BactroMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bactromod)", "[Effect Timer plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/effecttimerplus)" and more

You can use this modpack nearly on any server(you get not banned or something like that) 
I tested the modpack on [Hypixel/Hypixel.net](https://hypixel.net/)

Its recommended to play on [Lunar Client](https://www.lunarclient.com/) (but only for the "(Lunar)" versions) but only if you play hypixel, because the client has many cool features that can support you when you fighting

### IMPORTANT!!!:
You can activate the resource packs ("[Low fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack)" and "[Low shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack)")
but you dont need it (because of bactro mod)

### How to activate the resource packs:
to activate the resource packs press "Options..." or ingame press "ESC" And then press "Resource Packs..." search in the search bar "Low Fire" and go on the icon from the Resource pack and press on the arrow and then search up "Low Shield" and make the same(go on the icon and press the arrow)

## Credits:
the credits are going to the modpack "[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)" modpack where are the most performance mods from

**ENJOY ;)**
